name: Bug Triage & Support Queue
description: A severity-driven bug intake and triage workflow — new reports land in Triage, get a severity label within your SLA, and flow through confirmation, fix, and verification.

teams.name: Quality & Support
teams.description: Owns bug triage, severity classification, and customer-facing incident communication.

workflowStates.name: Confirmed
workflowStates.description: Reproduced and severity-tagged; queued for a fix.

workflowStates.name: Needs Verification
workflowStates.description: Fix shipped; awaiting QA / reporter confirmation.

workflowStates.name: Won't Fix / Duplicate
workflowStates.description: Not actionable, by design, or a duplicate of another report.

labels.name: sev-1-critical
labels.description: Data loss, outage, or security issue — fix immediately.

labels.name: sev-2-high
labels.description: Major feature broken for many users — fix this sprint.

labels.name: sev-4-low
labels.description: Cosmetic or edge-case — fix when convenient.

labels.name: regression
labels.description: Worked before a recent release; broken now.

labels.name: needs-repro
labels.description: Can't reproduce yet — needs more info from the reporter.

labels.name: customer-reported
labels.description: Filed by or on behalf of an external customer.

issueTemplates.title: [Bug report] Checkout fails with 500 on international addresses
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
### Steps to reproduce
1. Add item to cart
2. Enter a non-US shipping address
3. Click "Place order"

### Expected
Order is placed.

### Actual
`500 Internal Server Error`.

### Environment
Browser / OS / account / plan.

issueTemplates.title: Export to CSV truncates rows over 10,000
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Reported by 3 enterprise customers this week. Repro: create a view with >10k rows, export, count rows in the file.

issueTemplates.title: Avatar upload rotates portrait photos 90°
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: EXIF orientation isn't respected on upload. Affects iPhone photos taken in portrait mode.

issueTemplates.title: Regression: bulk-archive stopped working after the v2.4 release
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Worked in v2.3. Bisect suggests the `bulkArchive` mutation change in the last release.

issueTemplates.title: Tooltip text overflows on narrow (< 360px) screens
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Cosmetic only. Affects the priority tooltip in the issue row on very small phones.

issueTemplates.title: "Duplicate view" sometimes copies the wrong filters
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Can't reproduce consistently yet. Need the exact filter combination from the reporter.

issueTemplates.title: Verify fix: notification badge count desyncs after marking all read
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Fix merged in #482. Confirm the unread badge matches the actual unread count after "mark all as read" on slow connections.

views.name: Triage Queue
views.description: Everything new and unclassified — work this down to zero daily.

views.name: By Severity
views.description: Board grouped by severity label so SEV-1s are always visible at a glance.

views.name: All Bugs — Table
views.description: Full spreadsheet view for weekly bug-count reporting.
